819CA39B4036FF6ADB43C7A43887C975: Originally cliff-dwelling birds from Ahch-To, Porgs are known to drop <emphasis>Fervent Eggs</> after being pet or enjoying a snack. Depending on what they're fed, Porgs assigned to a <emphasis>Barn</> will produce even more items. A Porg that's eliminated may yield <emphasis>Feathers</>, <emphasis>Robust Meat</> ...or a guilty conscience.
